events.title: Weekly Bible Study: Why We Believe
events.description: Continuing our series on the evidence and reasons for the Christian faith. This week: The Problem of Evil.

events.title: Beach Volleyball Day
events.description: Join us for an afternoon of volleyball, food, and fellowship at the beach. Bring a towel and your game face!

events.title: Visiting Grace Community Church
events.description: We're visiting another church in the area to connect with other believers and see how they do ministry. Lunch afterward!

events.title: Bonfire & Worship Night
events.description: An evening of worship, testimonies, and s'mores around the bonfire. Bring a friend and your favorite worship song!

events.title: Weekly Bible Study: The Resurrection
events.description: Examining the historical evidence for the resurrection of Jesus Christ.

events.title: Game Night & Fellowship
events.description: Board games, video games, snacks, and good conversation. Everyone's welcome — come hang out!

events.title: Hiking & Reflection
events.description: A morning hike with time for reflection, prayer, and conversation. A great way to start the week.

events.title: Visiting Hillsong LA
events.description: We visited Hillsong LA to experience a different worship style and connect with other young adults.
